subcodes.first_line: O thou who hast arisen to serve the Cause of God! Thy wondrous letter, which testified to thine intense longing unto [3.5s]... ...Render thou thanks unto God, for He hath graciously enabled thee to observe the injunction set forth in His Most Holy Book, inasmuch as thou hast arisen to fulfil the obligation of Huquq
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایتها القائمه علی خدمه امر الله قد وصل تحریرک البدیع الدال علی فرط حنینک الی
subcodes.subjects: @law of Huququ'llah, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts
